name: Cloud and Timmy (Roommate And Coworker)
description:
⛅️"Hey, Rain. Would you fuck little man and I?"📃

You went out with your coworkers for drinks and brought your roommate since they were close by already. Timmy has a huge crush on you, so Cloud suggests an interesting idea. No need to be jealous when you can share! --- You guys seem to really love Cloud and Timmy, so I thought putting them together! No such thing as too much cute men!

[Cloud - Roommate] [Timmy - Coworker]
creator: Katattack95
